news.t: Overstock-heavy ETFs rally as online retailer surges, heads for its best daily showing since 2017

holdings.infoBox: BLCN is an equity ETF with a total of 36 individual holdings. The top holdings are First American Government Obligations Fund Class X stock at 19.97%, Samsung Electronics at 4.96%, TeraWulf at 3.81%, Microsoft at 3.19%, and Advanced Micro Devices at 3.16%.

overview.description: The Siren NexGen Economy ETF (BLCN) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Siren NASDAQ Blockchain Economy index. The fund actively manages a global portfolio of equities involved in the development, research, or application of blockchain technologies. BLCN was launched on Jan 17, 2018 and is issued by Siren.
